TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Hunhungaz ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 65 buwan, 229 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 219 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 84%, Amis 4%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hunhungaz hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Hunhungaz hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Hunhungaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hunhungaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hunhungaz hya' ga Silupatun. tay mkyahu' na Hunhungaz hya' ga Izukan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħunħuŋaz ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħunħuŋaz ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ħunħuŋaz ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħunħuŋaz ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħunħuŋaz ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħunħuŋaz ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕilupatun. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħunħuŋaz ħjaʔ ɣa izukan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Hunhungaz ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 65 buwan, 229 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 219 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 84%, Amis 4%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hunhungaz hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Hunhungaz hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Hunhungaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hunhungaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hunhungaz hya' ga Silupatun. tay mkyahu' na Hunhungaz hya' ga Izukan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħunħuŋaz ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħunħuŋaz ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ħunħuŋaz ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħunħuŋaz ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħunħuŋaz ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħunħuŋaz ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕilupatun. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħunħuŋaz ħjaʔ ɣa izukan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
